title: SentinAI — Node Health Detector
description: Fleet health score, node heatmaps, Day 0/Day 2 panels by workload type (Notebook / Single Node / Multi Node), DCGM metrics, severity breakdown.

panels.title: Fleet Health Score
panels.description: Percentage of nodes reporting healthy across the fleet. 1.0 = all nodes healthy. Watch for drops below 0.8.

panels.title: Healthy Nodes
panels.description: Count of nodes with all checks passing

panels.title: Unhealthy Nodes
panels.description: Count of nodes with one or more failing checks

panels.title: Cordoned Nodes
panels.description: Nodes where SentinAI recommends cordon

panels.title: Total Nodes
panels.description: Total nodes monitored by SentinAI

panels.title: Fleet Checks Passing
panels.description: Total passing checks across all nodes

panels.title: Fleet Checks Warned
panels.description: Total warned checks across all nodes

panels.title: Fleet Checks Failed
panels.description: Total failed checks across all nodes

panels.title: Fleet Total Checks
panels.description: Total checks executed across all nodes

panels.title: GPU
panels.description: Worst status for gpu across fleet

panels.title: CPU
panels.description: Worst status for cpu across fleet

panels.title: MEMORY
panels.description: Worst status for memory across fleet

panels.title: STORAGE
panels.description: Worst status for storage across fleet

panels.title: NETWORK
panels.description: Worst status for network across fleet

panels.title: KUBERNETES
panels.description: Worst status for kubernetes across fleet

panels.title: Fleet Health Score Over Time
panels.description: Percentage of healthy nodes over time. 1.0 = all healthy.

panels.title: Nodes by Health Status Over Time
panels.description: Stacked area: healthy vs unhealthy vs cordoned nodes.

panels.title: Node x Component Status (Fleet View)
panels.description: Each row = one node, each segment = component worst status. Green = PASS, Amber = WARN, Red = FAIL. Scan for red blocks.

panels.title: Node x Check Status (Selected Nodes)
panels.description: Per-check status for selected nodes. Each row = one check on one node. Use this to drill into specific node failures.

panels.title: Node Health
panels.description: 1 = healthy, 0 = unhealthy

panels.title: Cordon Signal
panels.description: Whether the detector recommends cordoning

panels.title: Passed
panels.description: Checks passed

panels.title: Warned
panels.description: Checks warned

panels.title: Failed
panels.description: Checks failed

panels.title: Total
panels.description: Checks total

panels.title: GPU
panels.description: Worst gpu check

panels.title: CPU
panels.description: Worst cpu check

panels.title: MEMORY
panels.description: Worst memory check

panels.title: STORAGE
panels.description: Worst storage check

panels.title: NETWORK
panels.description: Worst network check

panels.title: KUBERNETES
panels.description: Worst kubernetes check

panels.title: Day 0 Critical Path: Notebook (Single GPU)
panels.description:
Provisioning gate checks for Notebook (Single GPU). ALL must PASS before workload can schedule.

Single GPU workstation. Critical path: GPU driver + kubelet + runtime.

panels.title: Day 0 Critical Path: Single-Node Job (Multi-GPU)
panels.description:
Provisioning gate checks for Single-Node Job (Multi-GPU). ALL must PASS before workload can schedule.

Multi-GPU single node. Critical path: GPU + NVLink + NVSwitch + NCCL intra-node.

panels.title: Day 0 Critical Path: Multi-Node Job (Distributed Training)
panels.description:
Provisioning gate checks for Multi-Node Job (Distributed Training). ALL must PASS before workload can schedule.

Multi-node distributed training. Critical path: ALL — GPU + NVLink + IB + SR-IOV + Fabric + NCCL inter-node.

panels.title: Day 0 All Provisioning Checks Over Time
panels.description: SR-IOV VF, GPU Operator, Network Operator, BIOS, driver versions.

panels.title: Day 2 Critical Path: Notebook (Single GPU)
panels.description:
Runtime health checks for Notebook (Single GPU). Failure = job degradation or crash.

Single GPU workstation. Critical path: GPU driver + kubelet + runtime.

panels.title: Day 2 Critical Path: Single-Node Job (Multi-GPU)
panels.description:
Runtime health checks for Single-Node Job (Multi-GPU). Failure = job degradation or crash.

Multi-GPU single node. Critical path: GPU + NVLink + NVSwitch + NCCL intra-node.

panels.title: Day 2 Critical Path: Multi-Node Job (Distributed Training)
panels.description:
Runtime health checks for Multi-Node Job (Distributed Training). Failure = job degradation or crash.

Multi-node distributed training. Critical path: ALL — GPU + NVLink + IB + SR-IOV + Fabric + NCCL inter-node.

panels.title: Check Results (All)
panels.description: Every registered health check with current status, severity, and component.

panels.title: GPU Temperature
panels.description: Liquid-cooled B200: max 70C sustained. Air-cooled: max 83C.

panels.title: GPU ECC Errors
panels.description: DBE (double-bit, uncorrectable) = P0 CRITICAL. SBE = monitor trend.

panels.title: XID Error Timeline
panels.description: All XIDs on this node. Spikes = investigate. Critical: 48,79,74,61-64,94-95.

panels.title: NVLink Errors
panels.description: CRC, replay, recovery. Recovery > 0 = NVLink degradation.

panels.title: SM Clock — Current vs Max
panels.description: Clock delta > 10% = throttling. 30-90% perf degradation.

panels.title: PCIe Gen / Width
panels.description: Expected: Gen5 x16. Gen4 = 50% BW loss.

panels.title: Thermal & Power Violations
panels.description: Throttle time in microseconds.

panels.title: GPU Memory Usage
panels.description: B200 = 192 GB HBM3e per GPU.

panels.title: GPU Retired Pages
panels.description: Retired pages (SBE < 60 = OK, DBE must be 0). Indicates HBM degradation.

panels.title: P0 Critical
panels.description: Failing checks at severity P0 Critical

panels.title: P1 High
panels.description: Failing checks at severity P1 High

panels.title: P2 Medium
panels.description: Failing checks at severity P2 Medium

panels.title: P3 Low
panels.description: Failing checks at severity P3 Low

panels.title: Failing Checks by Severity Over Time
Cordon Signal Over Time
panels.description: 1 = cordon recommended. Sustained = auto-cordon after grace period.

panels.title: Last Check Run
panels.description: Timestamp of most recent check cycle

panels.title: Freshness
panels.description: Seconds since last check. Should be < interval.

panels.title: Health Status
panels.description: Redundant health indicator

panels.title: Component Health Over Time
panels.description: Worst status per component. 0=pass, 1=warn, 2=fail, 3=unknown.
